purpose: Support scenes and social share image. Reuse the jungle scene from 00-style-base for coherence.

items.prompt: Misty magical jungle clearing at dawn, an empty stone pedestal with a floating glowing teal rune inviting the viewer to begin their journey, warm god-rays, fireflies, no characters, 9:16, dark-fantasy premium mobile-game splash art
A great teal-orange bonfire burning bright on a stone altar in the magical jungle at night, golden sparks rising into the canopy, celebratory mood, no characters, 9:16

Wide banner: the chibi hero from public/avatars/hero-avatar.png standing on a jungle cliff at golden hour overlooking a glowing rune-lit valley, epic but friendly, teal and gold palette, room on the left third for a logo overlay, 1200x630, no text
